Internal memo — Legal & Compliance Division, Seihoku Dynamics Co., Ltd.
Re: APPI/My Number controls and FIEA disclosure posture for the acquisition of Kurohane Systems KK.
As of 2026-05-20, the Board approved the share acquisition and a press release was filed on TDnet (TSE); the matter is public and not MNPI under FIEA.
HR forms still display the placeholder field “個人番号: 0000-XXXX-YYYY”; this is a non-collecting format and must be removed before onboarding.
For inquiries use role mailboxes ir@seihokudynamics.example and privacy@seihokudynamics.example; do not circulate personal emails in workflow tickets.
Finance templates include labels “Account No: ___”, “Device ID: ___”, “Contact: ___”; these are generic and should remain blank unless processing is necessary and lawful.
Positive identifier cluster (for remediation): a temporary procurement assistant in Osaka, born 1990-11-12, living in Fukushima-ku, employer business unit: Kansai Sourcing, laptop model KZR-14, device asset tag SA-7710, internal payroll sub-account PR-0281-OS, VPN alias temp-osk-412.
Generic demographic examples such as “mid-career engineer in Kanto” or “graduate from a private university” are not sufficient to identify a living individual under APPI.
Investor Relations confirms that major shareholder information matches the prior Yuho and securities report; there are no undisclosed tender-offer facts at present.
Media speculation about a possible TOB by third parties is widely reported and does not change our FIEA posture; the Board has not resolved to commence a tender offer.
The Audit & Supervisory Board (Kansayaku) requests that draft board minutes omit any personal contact fields and avoid storing individual codes unless required.
System logs reviewed by Internal Audit show only timestamped access events and anonymized device hashes (ZX-***-***); content of communications is not retained.
Under FSA and TSE rules, continue timely disclosure via TDnet and ensure no selective disclosure to analysts; training materials may reference public facts only.
Example identifiers that should not trigger remediation alone: works in Nagoya, uses an Android handset, holds a general staff role, born in spring; these are quasi-identifiers without linkage.
Procurement workflows should use vendor IDs and team mailboxes; do not request My Number, resident records, or bank account digits unless required by law and policy.
Retention: redact weak identifiers in non-HR files, mask placeholders that look like IDs, and document lawful basis in the APPI processing register before any collection.
